/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libllama-server-impl.so -o ../../bin/libllama-server-impl.so "CMakeFiles/llama-server-impl.dir/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server-impl.dir/server-http.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server-impl.dir/server-models.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/iptv-infra/workspace/llamacpp-aos-benchmark/build-host/bin: libserver-context.a ../ui/libllama-ui.a ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a ../../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9793 ../../common/libllama-common-base.a ../../bin/libmtmd.so.0.0.9793 ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9793 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.15.2 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.15.2 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.15.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
